## SpaceX Stock: Bull and Bear 12-Month Price Projections Surveyed

A formal bull/bear projection survey for SPCX signals growing analyst attention to the name as it establishes a more liquid trading history; useful context alongside the Morgan Stanley $300 PT (cluster 8e4f2c66a1b1f6a4) and the 45% drawdown narrative (cluster c32b0271319820b2).

- Coverage aggregates bullish and bearish analyst price projections for SpaceX stock over the next 12 months.
- No specific price targets, analyst names, or projection figures are stated in the headline.
- The story is a sentiment survey and opinion piece, not driven by a new company event.
- Classifier confidence is medium.
